blended.narrative: Granite Peak is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
